purpose: Claude Code agent definition for `master-orchestrator`. It configures the agent role, loaded skills, and behavioral constraints used by the swarm runtime. Key content: --- name: master-orchestrator description: > Synapse swarm master agent. Plans task decomposition, dispatches worker agents via Task tool, monitors progress through dashboard files, and compiles comprehensive final reports. Use when orchestrating parallel work with !p_track, !p, or !master_plan_track commands. The master NEVER writes project source code — only dashboard/tracker files. skills: hooks: PreToolUse: hooks: command: ".claude/hooks/vali The file is 52 lines long and should be treated as a knowledge/control-plane source rather than application code.
patterns: Control-plane documentation pattern: markdown is treated as operational configuration for agents, not just explanatory prose.
conventions: Markdown headings use a single H1 followed by H2/H3 sections for navigable documentation.
Agent-control documents use `{tracker_root}`, `{project_root}`, and `{dashboardId}` placeholders instead of machine-specific paths.
ASCII double hyphen is used in prose where many docs avoid Unicode punctuation for terminal readability.
